LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APHEF.label: 20mm Phoenix APHEF
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APHEF.description: Fin-stabilized rocket-propelled tungsten carbide penetrator with variable ordnance core, designed for special purpose weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APEM.label: 20mm Phoenix APEM
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APEM.description: Fin-stabilized rocket-propelled tungsten carbide penetrator with variable ordnance core, designed for special purpose weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APHEI.label: 20mm Phoenix APHEI
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_APHEI.description: Fin-stabilized rocket-propelled tungsten carbide penetrator with variable ordnance core, designed for special purpose weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_HvAP.label: 20mm Phoenix HvAP
LanguageData.Ammo_20mmPhoenix_HvAP.description: Fin-stabilized rocket-propelled tungsten carbide penetrator with variable ordnance core, designed for special purpose weapons.
LanguageData.Bullet_20mmPhoenix_APHEF.label: 20mm JAR Phoenix APHEF
LanguageData.Bullet_20mmPhoenix_APEM.label: 20mm JAR Phoenix AP-EM
LanguageData.Bullet_20mmPhoenix_APHEI.label: 20mm JAR Phoenix APHEI
LanguageData.Bullet_20mmPhoenix_HvAP.label: 20mm JAR Phoenix
